tluaNumberKeyContextual.tlua(8,23): error TLUA2353: Object literal may only specify known properties, and '["x"]' does not exist in type 'NumIdx'.
tluaNumberKeyContextual.tlua(17,24): error TLUA2353: Object literal may only specify known properties, and '[1]' does not exist in type 'StrIdx'.


==== tluaNumberKeyContextual.tlua (2 errors) ====
    // A number index signature contextually types number-key entries only.
    interface NumIdx {
      [k: number]: string;
    }
    local ok: NumIdx = { [1] = "a", [2] = "b" };
    
    // A string-key entry is not covered by a number index signature: excess.
    local bad: NumIdx = { ["x"] = "a" }; // error
                          ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2353: Object literal may only specify known properties, and '["x"]' does not exist in type 'NumIdx'.
    
    // A string index signature contextually types string-key entries only.
    interface StrIdx {
      [k: string]: number;
    }
    local okS: StrIdx = { x = 1, y = 2 };
    
    // A number-key entry against a string index errors (disjoint).
    local badS: StrIdx = { [1] = 1 }; // error
                           ~~~
!!! error TLUA2353: Object literal may only specify known properties, and '[1]' does not exist in type 'StrIdx'.
    
    local es = {ok, bad, okS, badS};
